stemHtml: You have to determine the wind for a flight from VOR 1 to VOR 2 at FL55 with an OAT of +10°C. You passed VOR 1 at 12:10 UTC and arrived overhead VOR 2 at 12:18 UTC. Your magnetic heading is 005° and the calibrated airspeed is 145 kt. The distance between both VORs is 25 NM and the magnetic track from VOR 1 to VOR 2 is 355°. Calculate the wind direction (M) and speed:
